education_normalized.degree: Master in Innovation and Decision Making

work_experience_normalized.description: Identify new business opportunities / customers through contacts, events and research. Partnership establishment. Project management: CRM, PRM, TRM, risk analysis, KPIs, monitoring, career monitoring of personnel. Engagement with the customer: identification and analysis of business needs, communication and solutions proposal. Definition, creation and development of business plans: cold calling, client needs analysis and negotiation. Drafting, negotiation and closure of technical and commercial proposals, profit & loss management, cost control. Business case evaluation and new product/project development and monitoring. Leading a BU focused on aerospace and energy industries composed of more than 40 people.

work_experience_normalized.company: ETT for Airbus DS (TASST3-TL1), Randstad Getafe (Spain)
work_experience_normalized.description: Management of events and coordination for the A400M MDS Forum. Support on business development activities for OCCAR and promotion of the A400M MDS.

Structural response modelling for A400M fleet operation use monitoring based on machine learning / deep learning predictive simulation and data analysis with Python, Keras and PyTorch, SQL and MATLAB. Strain gauge analysis for Eurofighter and signal data processing with MATLAB.
C-295 fuel system modelling with CAD tool (CATIA) and drafting of technical guidance manuals.

Handling of technical manuals (AMM, SRM, IPC, ...). Production monitoring and reporting on OTCQP panels regarding maintenance task on C-235, F-18, C-130. Supervision of progress for scheduled maintenance tasks and events with Pelicano tool.
